proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_7plus3 have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_midostaurin have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_gilteritinib have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_ivosidenib have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_enasidenib have a higher objective_response rate than patients not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: ORR=0.1735 on treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine (n=20020) vs 0.1661 off (n=29980); risk diff=+0.0074; OR=1.054; chi2 p=0.03149
ORR=0.1702 on treatment_7plus3 (n=22580) vs 0.1681 off (n=27420); risk diff=+0.0021; OR=1.015; chi2 p=0.5397
ORR=0.1686 on treatment_midostaurin (n=7545) vs 0.1691 off (n=42455); risk diff=-0.0005; OR=0.996; chi2 p=0.9228
ORR=0.1630 on treatment_gilteritinib (n=7545) vs 0.1701 off (n=42455); risk diff=-0.0071; OR=0.950; chi2 p=0.1344
ORR=0.1709 on treatment_ivosidenib (n=3938) vs 0.1689 off (n=46062); risk diff=+0.0020; OR=1.015; chi2 p=0.7625
ORR=0.1611 on treatment_enasidenib (n=3972) vs 0.1697 off (n=46028); risk diff=-0.0086; OR=0.940; chi2 p=0.1724

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with tp53_mutation have a lower objective_response rate than patients without tp53_mutation.
Patients with complex_karyotype have a lower objective_response rate than patients without complex_karyotype.
Patients with secondary_aml have a lower objective_response rate than patients with de novo AML.
Patients with npm1_mutation have a higher objective_response rate than patients without npm1_mutation.
Patients flagged unfit_for_intensive have a lower objective_response rate than fit patients.

analyses.result_summary: ORR=0.1657 with tp53_mutation=1 (n=4985) vs 0.1694 with tp53_mutation=0 (n=45015); risk diff=-0.0037; OR=0.974; p=0.5197
ORR=0.1681 with complex_karyotype=1 (n=7462) vs 0.1692 with complex_karyotype=0 (n=42538); risk diff=-0.0012; OR=0.992; p=0.8179
ORR=0.1687 with secondary_aml=1 (n=12301) vs 0.1692 with secondary_aml=0 (n=37699); risk diff=-0.0005; OR=0.997; p=0.9148
ORR=0.1732 with npm1_mutation=1 (n=15014) vs 0.1673 with npm1_mutation=0 (n=34986); risk diff=+0.0059; OR=1.043; p=0.1092
ORR=0.1695 with unfit_for_intensive=1 (n=20056) vs 0.1687 with unfit_for_intensive=0 (n=29944); risk diff=+0.0007; OR=1.005; p=0.8411

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_midostaurin on objective_response is larger (more positive) in patients with flt3_itd=1 than in patients with flt3_itd=0 (positive treatment x biomarker interaction).
The effect of treatment_gilteritinib on objective_response is larger in patients with flt3_itd=1 than in patients with flt3_itd=0.
The effect of treatment_ivosidenib on objective_response is larger in patients with idh1_mutation=1 than without.
The effect of treatment_enasidenib on objective_response is larger in patients with idh2_mutation=1 than without.
The effect of treatment_midostaurin on objective_response is larger in patients with flt3_tkd=1 than without.

analyses.result_summary: In flt3_itd+: ORR with treatment_midostaurin=0.1614 (n=1468) vs 0.1737 (n=8532); In flt3_itd-: ORR with treatment_midostaurin=0.1703 (n=6077) vs 0.1680 (n=33923); interaction risk-diff=-0.0146; logistic interaction beta=-0.105, p=0.2185

In flt3_itd+: ORR with treatment_gilteritinib=0.1690 (n=1491) vs 0.1724 (n=8509); In flt3_itd-: ORR with treatment_gilteritinib=0.1615 (n=6054) vs 0.1695 (n=33946); interaction risk-diff=+0.0046; logistic interaction beta=+0.034, p=0.6861

In idh1_mutation+: ORR with treatment_ivosidenib=0.1745 (n=298) vs 0.2255 (n=3326); In idh1_mutation-: ORR with treatment_ivosidenib=0.1706 (n=3640) vs 0.1645 (n=42736); interaction risk-diff=-0.0571; logistic interaction beta=-0.364, p=0.02706

In idh2_mutation+: ORR with treatment_enasidenib=0.1441 (n=354) vs 0.1672 (n=4325); In idh2_mutation-: ORR with treatment_enasidenib=0.1628 (n=3618) vs 0.1700 (n=41703); interaction risk-diff=-0.0159; logistic interaction beta=-0.124, p=0.4477

In flt3_tkd+: ORR with treatment_midostaurin=0.1648 (n=443) vs 0.1623 (n=2372); In flt3_tkd-: ORR with treatment_midostaurin=0.1688 (n=7102) vs 0.1695 (n=40083); interaction risk-diff=+0.0032; logistic interaction beta=+0.023, p=0.8726

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher age_years is associated with lower probability of objective_response (negative log-odds slope).
Higher ecog_ps is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher wbc_k_per_ul is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher probability of objective_response.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher blast_pct_marrow is associated with lower probability of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate logistic: log-odds beta=+0.00040 per unit age_years, p=0.7183; n=50000
Univariate logistic: log-odds beta=-0.38374 per unit ecog_ps, p=1.842e-97; n=50000
Univariate logistic: log-odds beta=-0.00216 per unit wbc_k_per_ul, p=1.881e-05; n=50000
Univariate logistic: log-odds beta=+0.11512 per unit albumin_g_dl, p=1.359e-06; n=50000
Univariate logistic: log-odds beta=-0.00014 per unit ldh_u_l, p=0.3507; n=50000
Univariate logistic: log-odds beta=-0.00567 per unit blast_pct_marrow, p=1.156e-19; n=50000

proposed_hypotheses.text: Female patients (sex_female=1) have a different objective_response rate than male patients.
Patients with rural_residence=1 have a lower objective_response rate than urban-residence patients.
Black patients have a different objective_response rate than white patients.
Patients with insurance_type='uninsured' have a lower objective_response rate than patients with private insurance.
Patients with insurance_type='medicaid' have a lower objective_response rate than patients with private insurance.
The effect of treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine on objective_response is more negative (smaller benefit) in patients with tp53_mutation=1 than in patients with tp53_mutation=0 (negative interaction).
The effect of treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine on objective_response is larger (positive interaction) in patients with idh1_mutation=1 than without.
The effect of treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine on objective_response is larger (positive interaction) in patients with idh2_mutation=1 than without.
The effect of treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine on objective_response is larger (positive interaction) in patients with npm1_mutation=1 than without.
The effect of treatment_7plus3 on objective_response is more negative in patients with complex_karyotype=1 than in patients with complex_karyotype=0.
The effect of treatment_7plus3 on objective_response is more negative in patients with tp53_mutation=1 than in patients with tp53_mutation=0.

analyses.result_summary: Treatment effect (treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine) within tp53_mutation+: rd=-0.0036 (n=2048/2937); within tp53_mutation-: rd=+0.0086; interaction risk diff=-0.0123; logistic interaction beta=-0.087, p=0.2849

Treatment effect (treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine) within idh1_mutation+: rd=+0.1262 (n=1435/2189); within idh1_mutation-: rd=-0.0018; interaction risk diff=+0.1280; logistic interaction beta=+0.730, p=7.731e-18

Treatment effect (treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine) within idh2_mutation+: rd=-0.0077 (n=1921/2758); within idh2_mutation-: rd=+0.0090; interaction risk diff=-0.0167; logistic interaction beta=-0.120, p=0.1543

Treatment effect (treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine) within npm1_mutation+: rd=+0.0337 (n=6025/8989); within npm1_mutation-: rd=-0.0039; interaction risk diff=+0.0376; logistic interaction beta=+0.261, p=6.65e-07

Treatment effect (treatment_7plus3) within complex_karyotype+: rd=-0.0232 (n=3415/4047); within complex_karyotype-: rd=+0.0066; interaction risk diff=-0.0297; logistic interaction beta=-0.213, p=0.001644
Treatment effect (treatment_7plus3) within tp53_mutation+: rd=-0.0034 (n=2228/2757); within tp53_mutation-: rd=+0.0027; interaction risk diff=-0.0061; logistic interaction beta=-0.044, p=0.588

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with chronic_kidney_disease=1 have a lower objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with heart_failure=1 have a lower objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with diabetes_mellitus=1 have a different objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with prior_chemotherapy=1 have a lower objective_response rate than those without.
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with lower probability of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: ORR chronic_kidney_disease=1: 0.1759 (n=6060); chronic_kidney_disease=0: 0.1681 (n=43940); rd=+0.0078; OR=1.057; p=0.1327
ORR diabetes_mellitus=1: 0.1721 (n=11073); diabetes_mellitus=0: 0.1682 (n=38927); rd=+0.0040; OR=1.029; p=0.3325
ORR prior_chemotherapy=1: 0.1680 (n=22442); prior_chemotherapy=0: 0.1699 (n=27558); rd=-0.0018; OR=0.987; p=0.596
Univariate logistic: beta=+0.00685 per unit prior_lines_of_therapy, p=0.5145
Univariate logistic: beta=+0.01349 per unit fatigue_grade, p=0.2103
Univariate logistic: beta=-0.04014 per unit weight_loss_pct_6mo, p=7.43e-35
Univariate logistic: beta=-0.00700 per unit crp_mg_l, p=2.817e-06
Univariate logistic: beta=-0.00331 per unit nlr, p=0.5627

proposed_hypotheses.text: snp_rs1045642 (ABCB1) is associated with objective_response (allele dose linear effect).
snp_rs1065852 (CYP2D6) is associated with objective_response (allele dose linear effect).
snp_rs4244285 (CYP2C19) is associated with objective_response (allele dose linear effect).
snp_rs1801133 (MTHFR C677T) is associated with objective_response (allele dose linear effect).
snp_rs429358 (APOE) is associated with objective_response (allele dose linear effect).
There is an interaction between snp_rs1045642 and treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine on objective_response (drug-pgx interaction).
There is an interaction between snp_rs1065852 and treatment_midostaurin on objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate logistic on allele dose snp_rs1045642: beta=-0.01385 per allele, p=0.5639
Univariate logistic on allele dose snp_rs1065852: beta=+0.00722 per allele, p=0.8442
Univariate logistic on allele dose snp_rs4244285: beta=-0.01088 per allele, p=0.7052
Univariate logistic on allele dose snp_rs1801133: beta=+0.03645 per allele, p=0.1592
Univariate logistic on allele dose snp_rs429358: beta=-0.02373 per allele, p=0.4803
Logistic interaction beta=-0.0663, p=0.1747
Logistic interaction beta=+0.0744, p=0.4599

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, secondary_aml, complex_karyotype, tp53_mutation, npm1_mutation, flt3_itd, idh1_mutation, idh2_mutation, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine still has a positive adjusted effect on objective_response.
After the same adjustment, tp53_mutation retains a negative adjusted effect on objective_response.
After the same adjustment, npm1_mutation retains a positive adjusted effect on objective_response.
After the same adjustment, complex_karyotype retains a negative adjusted effect on objective_response.
After the same adjustment, ecog_ps retains a negative adjusted effect on objective_response.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with flt3_itd=1, treatment_midostaurin recipients have a higher objective_response rate than non-recipients.
Among patients with flt3_itd=1, treatment_gilteritinib recipients have a higher objective_response rate than non-recipients.
Among patients with idh1_mutation=1, treatment_ivosidenib recipients have a higher objective_response rate than non-recipients.
Among patients with idh2_mutation=1, treatment_enasidenib recipients have a higher objective_response rate than non-recipients.
Among patients flagged unfit_for_intensive=1, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine recipients have a higher objective_response rate than non-recipients.
Among patients with tp53_mutation=1, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine recipients have an objective_response rate not higher than non-recipients (refuting benefit in TP53-mutant).
Among patients with npm1_mutation=1, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine recipients have a higher objective_response rate than non-recipients.

analyses.result_summary: Within flt3_itd==1 (n=10000): ORR with treatment_midostaurin=0.1614 (n=1468); without=0.1737 (n=8532); rd=-0.0123; OR=0.917; p=0.2661
Within flt3_itd==1 (n=10000): ORR with treatment_gilteritinib=0.1690 (n=1491); without=0.1724 (n=8509); rd=-0.0034; OR=0.978; p=0.7772
Within idh1_mutation==1 (n=3624): ORR with treatment_ivosidenib=0.1745 (n=298); without=0.2255 (n=3326); rd=-0.0510; OR=0.731; p=0.05013
Within idh2_mutation==1 (n=4679): ORR with treatment_enasidenib=0.1441 (n=354); without=0.1672 (n=4325); rd=-0.0231; OR=0.845; p=0.2936
Within unfit_for_intensive==1 (n=20056): ORR with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0.1792 (n=8013); without=0.1630 (n=12043); rd=+0.0162; OR=1.121; p=0.002904
Within tp53_mutation==1 (n=4985): ORR with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0.1636 (n=2048); without=0.1672 (n=2937); rd=-0.0036; OR=0.975; p=0.7658
Within npm1_mutation==1 (n=15014): ORR with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0.1934 (n=6025); without=0.1596 (n=8989); rd=+0.0337; OR=1.262; p=9.801e-08
